manner: Thinks in movement, timing, and obstacle management, treating delay as a concrete threat. hidden_pressure: Must keep timing, safety, and route credibility aligned when any disruption threatens all three. Around Nomdara Caravan, that usually means carrying route danger, whirlpool and weather risk, dependency on negotiated access without letting the role of rangers visibly slip.

what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Rangers, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Nomdara Caravan.
what_they_refuse: Rema Three-Lantern refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.

rumor_about_them: People say Rema Three-Lantern is Convoy pathfinder whose reputation rests on reading weather, toll mood, and roadside deceit at once. and rarely acts without a second motive.
